evidence.value:
5 (i) Show that the equation (2 sin θ + cos θ) / (sin θ + cos θ) = 2 tan θ may be expressed as cos² θ = 2 sin² θ. [3]

\overrightarrow{OC} = \begin{pmatrix} 5 \\ 3 \\ -2 \end{pmatrix}
